stem: A quality control study surveys 100 manufactured units and observes 39 positive outcomes out of 100 (39.0%). Estimate the true product defect rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.39. Wilson 95% CI: [0.3002, 0.488]. Point estimate: 0.3941.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
